name: Performance Check
description: Identify performance bottlenecks in the project

input.command: find . -name '*.py' -o -name '*.js' -o -name '*.ts' -o -name '*.sh' | grep -v node_modules | grep -v .git | xargs wc -l 2>/dev/null | sort -rn | head -15
rg -c 'if |for |while |try |catch |except ' --type py --type js --type ts 2>/dev/null | sort -t: -k2 -rn | head -10 || echo 'No complex files found'
if [ -d dist ]; then du -sh dist; elif [ -d build ]; then du -sh build; elif [ -d .next ]; then du -sh .next; else echo 'No build output found'; fi

rg '^import |^from .* import |^require\(' --type py --type js --type ts 2>/dev/null | wc -l | xargs -I{} echo '{} total imports'; rg -c '^import |^from .* import ' --type py 2>/dev/null | sort -t: -k2 -rn | head -5 || true
